user_prompt:
![%D0%B8%D0%B7%D0%BE%D0%B1%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B6%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B8%D0%B5.webp](01-user-prompt-image-01.png)

1. Separate Commission dashboard page (with all data shown / expanded by default)
2. Extract projects to separate dashboard page

reference_page.layout_type: full-page dashboard with multiple collapsible cards
patterns_noted: CommissionVisibilityContext wraps commission card to hide/show dollar amounts
DrilldownTable cards use collapsible prop on Card component
showDetails toggler (Show commission structure) defaults to true in CommissionDashboard component
showAll toggler (Show all) defaults to false — dedicated page should default this to true

similar_patterns.description: Personal business line dashboard — separate page for a sub-view of a combined dashboard

image_observations: Top-level 'Commission' card with interval date-range picker, eye/visibility toggle and export button in toolbar
Three circular stats widgets: Summary (yellow), Structure (green), Sharing (blue)
'Commission drilldown' secondary collapsible card with 'Show commission structure' and 'Show all' togglers
'Forecast commission drilldown' secondary collapsible card, same togglers
Drilldown table columns: #, Client, SC, SNC, Team, $ NET Rev, % NET Budget, then grouped columns: Dir / Referral / Sharing / Commission
'RM projects' section with Revenue / Net Revenue / Origination stat bars and a project table
'LM projects' section with identical layout below RM projects
'All data shown / expanded by default' means: DrilldownTable cards not collapsed, showAll=true by default
